title: test_cmd_txdelay and cmd tests duplicate config struct
description: The test_cmd_txdelay, test_cmd_persistence, test_cmd_slottime, test_rx_ax25, test_rx_raw all inline the same kiss_transport_config with all LCI callbacks. This is duplication and risks inconsistency if LCI cbs change. Extract to helper test_config() function. Priority P2 as it affects maintainability. Tag: codereview
